LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltApparel.description: Use heat and strong electromagnets to break down apparel into useful resources. This operation will output 25% of the materials used to craft the apparel, excluding any components or advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltApparel.label: Smelt apparel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMechanoid.description: Use extreme heat to extract steel from mechanoid corpses. 10 steel will be extracted per 1 body size of the mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMechanoid.label: Smelt steel from mechanoid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromChunk.descripti: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from stone chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromChunk.label: Extract metal from stone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromMechSlag.descri: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from mechanoid slag chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromMechSlag.label: Smelt metal from mechanoid slag
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromSlag.descriptio: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from slag chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromSlag.label: Smelt metal from slag
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltWeapon.description: Use heat and strong electromagnets to break down weapons into useful resources. This operation will output 25% of the materials used to craft the weapon, excluding any components or advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltWeapon.label: Smelt weapons
